news.summary: Starting on May 30, the upcoming round of payouts to FTX creditors will commence, totaling more than $5 billion in recovered assets to be distributed.

news.summary: On May 15, 2025, Red White & Bloom Brands Inc. (CSE: RWB) released an update regarding a management cease trade order (MCTO) issued on May 1, 2025, by the British Columbia Securities Commission under National Policy 12-203. The MCTO was put in place in relation to the Company, and it affects the trading activities of RWB until certain filing requirements are met. This order prevents the Chief Executive Officer and the Chief Financial Officer from trading in securities. The MCTO will be lifted once the necessary filings are submitted, and shareholders informed accordingly. This order is intended to protect investors by ensuring a transparent and thorough disclosure of relevant information.
news.headline: Red White & Bloom Brands gives update on management cease trade order issued by BC Securities Commission.

news.summary: Kohl’s Corporation has confirmed the pricing of its private offering of $360 million aggregate principal amount of 10.000% senior secured notes due 2030. The notes, guaranteed by Kohl’s subsidiaries, will be secured by 11 distribution centers and e-commerce fulfillment facilities. The offering aims to raise funds and enhance financial security, demonstrating Kohl’s proactive approach to financial management and growth.
news.headline: Kohl's Corp priced $360M senior secured notes due 2030 in private offering, guaranteed by subsidiaries.

news.summary: On May 15, 2025, Bar None Auction launched its third site in the Western United States in Fontana, California. This new addition joined the existing locations in Sacramento, California, and Woodburn, Oregon, which were established in October 2024. Bar None Auction has expanded its operations to cater to the growing demand in the region. The Fontana site is fully operational, with a dedicated team trained to manage auctions seamlessly. The incorporation of advanced IT systems has further streamlined processes, enhancing efficiency for both the company and its customers.
news.headline: Bar None Auction opens 3rd location in Fontana, CA in Oct 2024, following sites in Sacramento, CA and Woodburn, OR.

news.summary: Ontario, California, on May 15, 2025 - The City of Ontario has dismissed the contentious claims made by the Inland Empire Utilities Agency (IEUA) in a public letter dated May 9, 2025. The city believes that IEUA's suggestions of cooperation are insincere and designed to deceive, despite...
news.headline: Ontario criticizes IEUA for blame game in letter received on May 9, 2025, citing lack of collaboration.

news.summary: Karnalyte Resources Inc. announced their financial results for the first quarter of 2025, including the filing of restated financial statements for the previous year. During Q1 2025, the company focused on advancing their NI 43-101 compliant technical report for mine development. They reviewed and refined technical sections, updated price forecasts, and aligned strategies with market conditions. The company is committed to advancing their potash project with a robust offtake agreement. They also evaluated the economic potential of increasing magnesium chloride production alongside the Potash Project using advanced mining technologies. Karnalyte listed and sold non-core farmland parcels in March 2025, generating net proceeds of $1,409,000. Their outlook for 2025 includes completing the technical report update, optimizing construction plans, enhancing project sustainability, and reviewing their development strategy. They aim to intensify business development activities, seek partnerships, and drive sustainable growth.
news.headline: Karnalyte Resources Inc. reported Q1 2025 results, restated 2024 financials, and progress on its NI 43-101 technical report. The company listed three farmland parcels for sale, closing in April with $1,409,000 net proceeds. Plans for 2025 include completing the technical report update, optimizing construction plans, and reviewing the development strategy. Karnalyte aims to enhance project sustainability, optimize asset portfolio, and seek partnerships for project advancement.

news.summary: In the second quarter of 2025, a quarterly distribution of C$0.02 per common share was announced, marking the twenty-third consecutive quarter of shareholder distributions.
news.headline: Mount Logan Capital Inc. declares C$0.02 per share distribution for Q2 2025, marking 23 quarters of consecutive distributions.

news.summary: White Castle recently announced the induction of 14 individuals into its prestigious hall of fame. Among the honorees are longtime friends who have been organizing an annual Slider-eating contest since 1967, a dedicated woman who cycled 36 miles to visit a White Castle location, and a renowned glam rocker who penned a song centered around eating Sliders. The induction ceremony took place in Columbus, Ohio on May 15, 2025. This event marked a significant milestone for White Castle and honored individuals who have demonstrated exceptional dedication and creativity in their relationship with the iconic fast-food chain.
news.headline: White Castle inducts 14 devoted fans into Cravers Hall of Fame. Includes those part of annual contest since 1967 and woman who biked 36 miles to get there.

news.summary: In Shanghai, Align Technology, Inc. (ALGN) has gained approval from the National Medical Products Administration (NMPA) in China for its Invisalign Palatal Expander System. Align is a prominent medical device company listed on Nasdaq. They specialize in the production and distribution of the Invisalign System, iTero intraoral scanners, and exocad CAD/CAM software for digital orthodontics and restorative dentistry. This recent approval marks a significant milestone for Align in the Chinese market.
news.headline: Align Technology's Invisalign Palatal Expander approved in China for skeletal and dental expansion in growing patients.

news.summary: In Redmond, Washington, Nintendo inaugurated its second official store in the United States, Nintendo SAN FRANCISCO, with a ribbon-cutting ceremony led by Nintendo of America President and COO Doug Bowser. Situated in San Francisco’s Union Square at 331 Powell Street, the store aims to provide visitors an engaging shopping experience. Apart from offering game systems and games, the store provides various interactive activities and exclusive merchandise. This new location marks a significant expansion for Nintendo, enhancing its presence and offering in the retail sector.
news.headline: Nintendo opens second US store in San Francisco, located at 331 Powell Street, offering immersive shopping experience to visitors.

Additionally, authorities have announced that there have been 10 new fatalities, raising the death toll to 50. The local hospital is currently treating 30 patients for the virus, with 5 in critical condition. The government has urged the public to adhere to safety guidelines and regulations to help curb the spread of the virus.

news.summary: In Philadelphia, the Rite Aid Corporation revealed a major development today, stating their completion of a set of sale agreements and pharmacy services transition agreements. These agreements involve the transfer of pharmacy assets from over 1,000 store locations throughout the United States to various operators such as CVS Pharmacy, Walgreens, Albertsons, Kroger, and Giant Eagle. Additionally, CVS Pharmacy is set to take over the sale and operation of numerous Rite Aid and Bartell Drug stores. This strategic move signifies a significant shift in the pharmacy market landscape, impacting a substantial number of stores and customers nationwide.
news.headline: Rite Aid sells pharmacy assets from over 1,000 stores to CVS, Walgreens, etc to ensure continuity of care.

news.summary: In Calgary, Alberta on May 15, 2025, Calfrac Well Services Ltd. ("Calfrac") (TSX–CFW) disclosed the outcome of the director elections at its recent yearly shareholder meeting. All director nominees were successfully voted in to serve until the subsequent annual meeting or until their replacements are elected or named. Complete voting breakdowns for each nominee are available below, with comprehensive voting results on all meeting agendas to be lodged on Calfrac's SEDAR+ profile (www.sedarplus.ca).
news.headline: Calfrac announces election of directors at annual meeting with successful voting results, full details at SEDAR+.

news.summary: HCW Biologics Inc., a biopharmaceutical company, recently reported financial results for Q1 2025 with revenues totaling $5.1 million, compared to $1.1 million in 2024. The company completed an equity offering, raising $5.0 million for a Phase 1 clinical trial on autoimmune disorder therapy. They expect revenue from a licensing agreement with WY Biotech to result in a $7.0 million upfront fee. The company also achieved FDA clearance for a Phase 1 clinical trial on HCW9302 for alopecia areata treatment. Despite a net loss of $2.2 million in Q1 2025, the company plans to focus on developing and commercializing their immunotherapies to treat chronic inflammation-related diseases, aiming to improve patient health and longevity. They have multiple proprietary platforms for drug discovery and expect to ramp up business development efforts in the second half of 2025. The company aims to secure additional funding or financial support to ensure its continuity beyond the next 12 months.
news.headline: HCW Biologics, a biopharmaceutical company, reported Q1 2025 highlights: $5.0M equity offering, $7.0M licensing fee expected, $5,065 revenue, $2.2M net loss. The company focuses on immunotherapies to address diseases caused by inflammation and aging, with lead candidates HCW9302 and HCW9206. Despite challenges, they aim to secure additional funding for future projects.

news.summary: In Morgan City, Louisiana, on May 15, 2025, Conrad Industries, Inc. (OTC Pink: CNRD) reported its performance for the first quarter of 2025. Between January 1 and March 31, 2025, the company generated a net income of $3.9 million, with earnings per diluted share at $0.77. This is a significant increase from the same period in 2024, where net income was $1.5 million and earnings per diluted share were at $0.30. The financial statements of the company can be accessed on www.otcmarkets.com. During the first quarter of 2025, Conrad secured contracts amounting to $67.3 million in its new construction division, a notable rise from the $51.8 million secured in the first quarter of 2024. More details about this news can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Conrad Industries reports Q1 2025 net income of $3.9M and EPS of $0.77, up from Q1 2024. $67.3M new contracts signed.

news.summary: There's a significant shift in the foreign exchange and payments industry due to the rise of stablecoins, as highlighted by investor Kevin O’Leary during Consensus 2025. Legacy platforms charge large fees for cross-border transfers, but this could change with stablecoins becoming a faster and cheaper alternative. The potential approval of regulated stablecoins could make the multi-trillion-dollar FX market more efficient and transparent. U.S lawmakers are working on the Genius Act to regulate stablecoins, aiming for approval by May. This is causing concern in the financial services industry as it could lead to global adoption and unlock trillions in institutional capital. As of May 15, stablecoins have a collective market capitalization of nearly $250 billion, with Tether's USDT leading at around $150 billion, followed by Circle's USDC at over $60 billion. Regulatory clarity in stablecoins might pave the way for broader cryptocurrency reforms and innovations.
news.headline: Legacy forex and payment platforms fear stablecoin rise, threaten their profits, says Kevin O’Leary at Consensus. US lawmakers push for stablecoin regulation via the Genius Act to accelerate global adoption. Stablecoins hit $250B market cap; Tether leads with $150B, followed by USDC with $60B. Regulatory clarity for stablecoins could pave the way for broader crypto reforms.

news.headline: Officials consider limiting Covid vaccine recommendations as uncertainty remains on availability of new shots this fall.

news.summary: On May 15, 2025, HCW Biologics Inc., a company traded on NASDAQ under the symbol HCWB, based in Miramar, Florida, shared its financial outcomes and recent achievements for the quarter ending on March 31, 2025. The biopharmaceutical firm, concentrating on creating innovative immunotherapies to extend health span by interrupting the connection between inflammation and age-related illnesses, provided an overview of its progress.
news.headline: HCW Biologics reports Q1 2025 highlights and financial results, focusing on novel immunotherapies for health span.

news.summary: Coinbase's chief legal officer, Paul Grewal, discussed concerns regarding President Trump's involvement in the crypto industry at the Consensus conference on May 15. The Senate Banking Committee's advancement of the GENIUS Act faced disputes, with Democrats like Senator Elizabeth Warren opposing due to Trump family's crypto venture, World Liberty Financial. Grewal mentioned challenges in regulating the spot market due to Trump's support for certain memecoins. Despite disagreements, lawmakers are expected to vote on the bill soon, with modifications addressing consumer protection, Anti-Money Laundering, and national security concerns. The House is also considering a draft for a digital asset market structure bill, with Democratic representatives raising concerns over "Trump's crypto corruption." Grewal expressed optimism in addressing these issues and lawmakers sorting out regulations despite the complications.
news.headline: Coinbase exec addresses concerns over Trump’s crypto involvement impacting legislation. Congress faces challenges in regulating stablecoins.

news.summary: On May 15, 2025, in Vancouver, British Columbia, Westport Fuel Systems Inc. (known as "Westport" or the "Company") conducted its Annual General and Special Meeting of Shareholders virtually. Shareholders, trading under TSX:WPRT and Nasdaq:WPRT, unanimously approved all agenda items. This included the re-election of directors for the upcoming year, the designation of KPMG LLP as auditors for the fiscal year, an advisory vote on executive compensation, and the agreed sale of Westport Fuel Systems Italia S.r.l as outlined in the March 30, 2025, sale and purchase agreement.
news.headline: Westport holds virtual Annual General and Special Meeting with all resolutions approved, including sale of Westport Fuel Systems Italia S.r.l as per agreement.

news.summary: Toronto-based Kontrol Technologies Corp. (CBOE.CA:KNR) (OTCQB:KNRLF) (FSE:1K8) has revealed its financial outcomes for the first quarter ending March 31, 2025. The Company has filed its Financial Statements and Management's Discussion & Analysis on SEDAR (www.sedarplus.ca). With a strategic focus on core operating business, Kontrol has successfully trimmed down operating costs following the sale of emission assets.
news.headline: Kontrol Technologies reports Q1 2025 results, streamlines operations and reduces expenses, with focus on core business.

news.summary: SSC Security Services Corp. reported its second quarter results for the period ending March 31, 2025. The company noted improved profitability with a gross profit margin of 16.1% for the quarter, up from 15.2% the previous year. They paid a 35th consecutive quarterly dividend of $0.03 per share and conducted share buybacks, acquiring 99,500 shares at an average of $2.54 per share. Adjusted EBITDA remained consistent at $1.0 million for both the current and previous year's second quarter. The company finished the quarter with $12.5 million in cash, working capital of $25.6 million, total equity of $62.6 million, and no long-term debt. Quarterly revenue was reported at $27.676 million, down from $30.402 million the previous year, while six-month revenue was $56.871 million, down from $61.284 million the previous year. Other key metrics like cost of sales, gross margin, and gross margin percentage were provided for comparison.
news.headline: SSC Security Services Corp. reports Q2 results, with improved margins and consistent adjusted EBITDA. Gross profit margin at 16.1%, paid $0.03 dividend per share, bought back 99,500 shares at $2.54. Adjusted EBITDA at $1.0 million. Cash reserves $12.5 million. Total shareholders' equity at $62.6 million, no long-term debt. Q2 revenue at $27.7 million, gross margin at 16.1%. Six-month revenue at $56.9 million, gross margin at 16.3%.

news.summary: After reporting its first-quarter earnings, KULR Technology Group Inc (AMEX: KULR) witnessed a decline in its stock price during the after-hours trading session. The company's Q1 revenue stood at $2.45 million, falling short of the estimated $2.85 million as per Benzinga Pro. Despite the miss, there was a 40% year-over-year increase in total revenue, driven by an 88.7% surge in product sales. KULR Technology incurred a loss of seven cents per share for the first quarter. For more details, the complete report can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: KULR Technology Group stock drops after Q1 earnings miss estimates, revenue at $2.45 million and company plans to boost Bitcoin strategy.

news.summary: Howard Hughes Holdings Inc. saw a rise in premarket trading as they announced a deal with Pershing Square to invest $900 million for 9,000,000 new HHH shares. This acquisition at $100 per share marks a 48% premium over the previous closing price on May 2, 2025. Following this agreement, Pershing Square will have a 46.9% ownership in HHH but will limit its voting power to 40% and beneficial ownership to 47%. This investment allows HHH to expand into a holding company by taking control of operating businesses while still focusing on its real estate core.
news.headline: Pershing Square invests $900 million in Howard Hughes Holdings, acquiring 9,000,000 shares at $100 each with a 48% premium.

news.summary: Oil prices experienced a significant drop following an unexpected production increase by OPEC+. This decision led to a plunge in crude prices and prompted a negative market reaction. Goldman Sachs responded by revising its oil price forecast, reducing it by $2 to $3. The new projections estimate Brent and WTI to have average prices of $60 and $56, respectively, for the remainder of 2025, and $56 and $52 in 2026. This adjustment was made due to concerns over high spare capacity and a notable recession risk, which could drive oil prices downward despite current tight spot fundamentals. West Texas Intermediate futures began at $55.36 per barrel before leveling out at $57.10 on Monday morning, recovering slightly from the initial drop. OPEC+'s decision to boost production by 411,000 barrels per day was the primary catalyst for the oil selloff.
news.headline: Goldman Sachs predicts $40 oil as OPEC+ raises production, causing stocks to plummet. Oil prices forecasted to average $60 and $56 for 2025, $56 and $52 for 2026, due to high spare capacity and recession risks. OPEC+ decision leads to WTI futures opening at $55.36 and recovering to $57.10.
